outputs: Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
warnings: When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
Where the command appears to answer a question not asked, attach the transcript to the nearest related form and do not ask the terminal to clarify itself.
The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
